mapper.sql: OrdrNo, ModelNo, Quantity, PresPrice, StdPrice, TransType, OrdDate, DlvDate, CustomerNo, UserNo, VndCode, OptState, SpecMark, LocationNo, DeptNo, DeliveryNo, StateFlag, QtyReceive, FinishDate, DisCount, ErrCode, SpFlag, Remark, VIPCode, OrdDateFlag, PreQtyOrd, AnswerNo, SmcCode, OrdFlag, SWeight, DlvDate_JP, Expdate_GC, DlvModDate, Remark_GC, RedPrice, MultPrice_Flag, EmpOrdprocess, QtyImput, DlvModDate1, DlvModDate2, Reason_Remark, Produce_DeptNo, InvoiceNo, Impdate, TransType_Mod, DlvAnswerNo1, DlvAnswerNo2, Qty_Produced, CnNo, ShiKomiNo, DlvModDate3, OrdType, OrdAdmit_Flag, DeliveryFlag, QtyOnHand, Produce_Factory, Produce_Holon, Errdescription, SalesInfoNo, HSCode, GreenCode, OrderNO_GSS, OrderNO_Item_GSS, InDate_theory, RcvOrd_Date, InDate_InFact, Exp_date, Export_Flag, Holon_Name, BeginProduce_date, DlvModTime1, DlvModTime2, DlvModTime3, TradeCompanyId
mapper.select:
select
distinct
from dbo._OrderData
order by ${orderByClause}
mapper.insert: insert into dbo._OrderData (OrdrNo, ModelNo, Quantity, PresPrice, StdPrice, TransType, OrdDate, DlvDate, CustomerNo, UserNo, VndCode, OptState, SpecMark, LocationNo, DeptNo, DeliveryNo, StateFlag, QtyReceive, FinishDate, DisCount, ErrCode, SpFlag, Remark, VIPCode, OrdDateFlag, PreQtyOrd, AnswerNo, SmcCode, OrdFlag, SWeight, DlvDate_JP, Expdate_GC, DlvModDate, Remark_GC, RedPrice, mapper.update:
update dbo._OrderData
OrdrNo = #{record.ordrno,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
ModelNo = #{record.modelno,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
Quantity = #{record.quantity,jdbcType=INTEGER},
PresPrice = #{record.presprice,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
StdPrice = #{record.stdprice,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
TransType = #{record.transtype,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
OrdDate = #{record.orddate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
DlvDate = #{record.dlvdate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
CustomerNo = #{record.customerno,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
UserNo = #{record.userno,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
VndCode = #{record.vndcode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
OptState = #{record.optstate,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
SpecMark = #{record.specmark,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
LocationNo = #{record.locationno,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
DeptNo = #{record.deptno,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
DeliveryNo = #{record.deliveryno,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
StateFlag = #{record.stateflag,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
QtyReceive = #{record.qtyreceive,jdbcType=INTEGER},
FinishDate = #{record.finishdate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
DisCount = #{record.discount,jdbcType=BIGINT},
ErrCode = #{record.errcode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
SpFlag = #{record.spflag,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
Remark = #{record.remark,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
VIPCode = #{record.vipcode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
OrdDateFlag = #{record.orddateflag,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
PreQtyOrd = #{record.preqtyord,jdbcType=INTEGER},
AnswerNo = #{record.answerno,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
SmcCode = #{record.smccode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
OrdFlag = #{record.ordflag,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
SWeight = #{record.sweight,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
DlvDate_JP = #{record.dlvdateJp,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
Expdate_GC = #{record.expdateGc,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
DlvModDate = #{record.dlvmoddate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
Remark_GC = #{record.remarkGc,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
RedPrice = #{record.redprice,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
MultPrice_Flag = #{record.multpriceFlag,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
EmpOrdprocess = #{record.empordprocess,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
QtyImput = #{record.qtyimput,jdbcType=INTEGER},
DlvModDate1 = #{record.dlvmoddate1,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
DlvModDate2 = #{record.dlvmoddate2,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
Reason_Remark = #{record.reasonRemark,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
Produce_DeptNo = #{record.produceDeptno,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
InvoiceNo = #{record.invoiceno,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
Impdate = #{record.impdate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
TransType_Mod = #{record.transtypeMod,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
DlvAnswerNo1 = #{record.dlvanswerno1,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
DlvAnswerNo2 = #{record.dlvanswerno2,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
Qty_Produced = #{record.qtyProduced,jdbcType=INTEGER},
CnNo = #{record.cnno,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
ShiKomiNo = #{record.shikomino,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
DlvModDate3 = #{record.dlvmoddate3,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
OrdType = #{record.ordtype,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
OrdAdmit_Flag = #{record.ordadmitFlag,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
DeliveryFlag = #{record.deliveryflag,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
QtyOnHand = #{record.qtyonhand,jdbcType=INTEGER},
Produce_Factory = #{record.produceFactory,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
Produce_Holon = #{record.produceHolon,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
Errdescription = #{record.errdescription,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
SalesInfoNo = #{record.salesinfono,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
HSCode = #{record.hscode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
GreenCode = #{record.greencode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
OrderNO_GSS = #{record.ordernoGss,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
OrderNO_Item_GSS = #{record.ordernoItemGss,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
InDate_theory = #{record.indateTheory,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
RcvOrd_Date = #{record.rcvordDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
InDate_InFact = #{record.indateInfact,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
Exp_date = #{record.expDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
Export_Flag = #{record.exportFlag,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
Holon_Name = #{record.holonName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
BeginProduce_date = #{record.beginproduceDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
DlvModTime1 = #{record.dlvmodtime1,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
DlvModTime2 = #{record.dlvmodtime2,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
DlvModTime3 = #{record.dlvmodtime3,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
TradeCompanyId = #{record.tradecompanyid,jdbcType=VARCHAR},

update dbo._OrderData set OrdrNo = #{record.ordrno,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, ModelNo = #{record.modelno,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, Quantity = #{record.quantity,jdbcType=INTEGER}, PresPrice = #{record.presprice,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, StdPrice = #{record.stdprice,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, TransType = #{record.transtype,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, OrdDate = #{record.orddate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, DlvDate =
